title: Update: One family finds closure
description: GEORGE NEWS - The family of Magxwalisa...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The family of Magxwalisa Andile (59), a South African who lost his life on the building site at 75 Victoria Street, briefly visited the site early this morning at 06:45 for a ceremonial prayer.

The family did not wish to comment to the press.


> The family is taking him back home, to King Williams Town in the Eastern Cape.


Avbob provided the burial services and will transport the casket to Andile's hometown.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
